description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk with a square cross-section, rising from a circular, stonework base that is partially encircled by a low wall. The obelisk is weathered, with patches of green moss or lichen clinging to its surface, giving it an ancient and neglected appearance. At the base, there is a dense cluster of sculpted skulls, adding a macabre and decorative element to the structure. The surrounding low wall is constructed from large, uneven stone blocks, and a circular golden ring is embedded in the ground in front of the obelisk, possibly serving as a ritual or ornamental feature. Several broken wooden stakes or beams protrude from the base area, suggesting past use or damage. The overall design is evocative of a dark fantasy or gothic urban monument, blending somber memorial with supernatural or ritualistic themes.
description: A weathered stone obelisk rises from a skull-adorned base, surrounded by moss, a circular golden ring, and broken wooden beams. The structure has a gothic, ancient appearance with macabre decorative elements.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from an angle, highlighting the cluster of skulls at the base and the mossy stonework, with the golden ring and broken beams visible to the right.
description_view_1: A frontal view shows the obelisk centered above the skull-covered base, with the circular golden ring and skulls clearly visible in front.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the circular golden ring and the broken wooden beams, with the obelisk and skulls partially obscured by the stone wall.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the plain stonework of the obelisk and the back of the skull cluster, with less visibility of the golden ring and beams.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk base is heavily ornamented with sculpted skulls arranged in dense clusters around the lower section. Moss or lichen patches add natural decorative texture to the stone surfaces.
attribute_base_design: The base is circular and constructed from large, uneven stone blocks, partially encircled by a low wall. It features a dense ring of sculpted skulls and a golden ring embedded in the ground, with broken wooden beams scattered nearby.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is pointed and pyramidal, with a slightly weathered finish and patches of green moss, but no additional decorations.
attribute_surrounding_features: A circular golden ring is embedded in the ground in front of the obelisk, and several broken wooden beams or stakes are scattered around the base. The base is surrounded by a low stone wall and clusters of sculpted skulls.
